name_en: 《Exclusive New Arrival》🆕🆕YSL Saint Laurent has released a hot item❗❗It has to be said that the (Saint Laurent) crossbody, handbag, chain bag is on fire in the fashion world. The toothpick strap can be used directly as a clutch, another hot item. Inside and out exudes a charming aura. The bag has 4 card slots and a front pocket. Paired with exquisite craftsmanship 😖. The quality is worth it. Model=26607 Dimensions 22x15.5x6cm
